title: LDXDRU 60 Pack 260ml/9oz Multi-Colored Plastic Drinking Cups, Tumblers for Picnic, Camping, Party, Kitchen, Outdoor Barbecue, Travels
features: 【Package Includes】Each package includes 60 pack of plastic cup in six colors - yellow, red, purple, green ,blue and orange, 10pcs for each color. The size of drinking party cups is 6.8 x 5 x 10.4cm / 2.6 x 1.96 x 4.09 inch (Top Dia. x Base Dia. x H) with capacity of 260ml / 9.2oz.

【Premium Material】Made of high quality plastic material, the picnic camping cup is sturdy and lightweight, which could be used for a long time. There are 6 bright colors plastic party cups for choose, which is not easy to break and damage, meeting for your daily use.

【Stackable Design】The small drinking cups are stackable, allowing you to stack them for storage and organization, perfect for saving space when not in use. You could put the multi-colored camping cups on the tabletop in the kitchen and living room.

【Convenient Design】The edge and surface of party plastic beaker are smooth with no burr, preventing your hand from scratching. The small plastic drinking cup is easy to clean. You could clean with water and wipe with wet cloth, then wait until dry.

【Wide Applications】The multi-colored plastic cups could be used in many occasions, such as kitchen, outdoor parties, picnics, camping, hiking, barbecues and travels. You could use picnic camping cups to store juice, coffee, beer, water, milk and wine.
